creator: karels@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #28)

overlays is not in /boot, but in /boot/dtb.  I think it is unused, but I could be wrong.  My RPi4 has /boot/msdos/dtb and /boot/msdos/overlays, but as indicated by the name, that is not part of the standard BSD filesystem hierarchy.
